boxes.label: 1 · You draw
boxes.note: Add boxes, drag them around, resize from the corner, tap to write a note explaining the idea. Link boxes with arrows.

boxes.label: 2 · Mirror writes JSON
boxes.note: With Sync settings → Local file mirror on (path = this repo's isan/apps), every box lands in isan/apps/design/data/boxes.json within ~1s.

boxes.label: 3 · Claude reads & replies
boxes.note: Tell Claude 'look at the design board'. Claude reads boxes.json and replies by writing inbox.json — answer boxes (coral) and discussion notes appear in the app.

boxes.label: Example: amber = question
boxes.note: Use the 'Question for Claude' button for things you want Claude to answer or design. Put the actual question in this note field.

notes.title: How this board works
notes.body: Board tab: boxes + arrows, color-coded by kind. Sketch tab: freehand drawing for anything boxy boxes can't say. This tab: running discussion. Everything is data, so it mirrors to disk (Claude reads it) and Claude writes back via inbox.json. JSON-only — no rebuild needed for changes to this applet.
notes.author: claude
